Placing too much emphasis on fulfillment: The mistake here is putting pressure on oneself to be happy. So the advice would be to not put too much pressure. But the options don't directly address this. 2. Keeping it all in: The mistake is not expressing emotions. So the advice would be to not suppress emotions. But again, the options don't mention this. 3. Looking at your smartphone all the time: The mistake is spending too much time on social media. So the advice is to reduce that time.
